description: Join Binance as they celebrate 8 years of innovation and community building. Hear heartfelt stories from Binance angels and insights from co-founder E on the evolution of crypto and the significance of Bitcoin's recent all-time high.
topic_summary: Celebration of Binance's 8th anniversary featuring community stories and insights from co-founder E about the crypto industry's growth and Bitcoin's all-time high [t=199.08].
